top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds, 
       CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR006' 
  AND b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds, 
       CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR006' 
  AND b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM bond b 
     JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
     WHERE m.label = 'TR006' AND b.bond_type = 'double') AS double_bonds,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR006' AND label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS carcinogenic;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds,
       CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = 'double'
WHERE m.label = 'TR006'
GROUP BY m.label;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds, 
       CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR006' 
  AND b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM bond b 
     JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
     WHERE m.label = 'TR006' AND b.bond_type = 'double') AS double_bonds,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR006' AND label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS carcinogenic;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds,
       CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = 'double'
WHERE m.label = 'TR006'
GROUP BY m.label;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bonds, 
       CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR006' 
  AND b.bond_type = 'double';
